torch_pattern: q_proj, k_proj, v_proj = xqkv.split([num_q_heads * head_dim, num_kv_heads * head_dim, num_kv_heads * head_dim], dim=-1); q = q_proj.reshape(batch, seq_len, num_q_heads, head_dim).transpose(1, 2); k = k_proj.reshape(batch, seq_len, num_kv_heads, head_dim).transpose(1, 2); v = v_proj.reshape(batch, seq_len, num_kv_heads, head_dim).transpose(1, 2); k = k.transpose(-2, -1) if transpose_k_heads else k
applicability_notes: torch_pattern_source: inferred from unit-test output-shape assertions: q.padded_shape == [batch, num_q_heads, seq_len, head_dim]; k transposed when transpose_k=True; constraints: {'input_layout': 'TILE_LAYOUT', 'input': 'fused interleaved QKV activation of shape [batch, 1, seq_len, (num_q_heads + 2*num_kv_heads) * head_dim]', 'input_memory': 'height-sharded L1 (shard spec must match output shard spec in test)', 'outputs': 'q: [batch, num_q_heads, seq_len, head_dim]; k: [batch, num_kv_heads, seq_len, head_dim] (or [batch, num_kv_heads, head_dim, seq_len] if transpose_k_heads); v: [batch, num_kv_heads, seq_len, head_dim]'}

placement_observations.source: test: in0_t placed with in0_mem_config; out_shard_spec = in0_shard_spec implies input is height-sharded L1 with same shard spec as output

placement_observations.size_descriptor: q: [batch, num_q_heads, seq_len, head_dim]; k/v: [batch, num_kv_heads, seq_len, head_dim]
